touches.ai_summary: Cold email sent to Finn Koch introducing our automation platform for sales teams. No response received.
Follow-up cold email sent to Finn Koch highlighting ROI case studies for SMB sales teams. No response received.
LinkedIn message sent to Finn Koch offering productivity insights for growing sales orgs. No response received.
Cold call attempt to Finn Koch. No answer, left voicemail about streamlining rep workflows.
Cold email sent to Finn Koch with video demo link and scheduling options. No response received.
Follow-up email to Finn Koch checking if automation could help with Q2 pipeline goals. Finn responded expressing interest in learning more about productivity tools for his team.

questions_asked.question: What kind of time savings are your customers typically seeing?
questions_asked.answer: Most teams reduce manual work by 40-60% in the first quarter, freeing up 10-15 hours per rep per week for actual selling.

touches.ai_summary: 12-minute discovery call with Finn Koch. Discussed current pain points around manual data entry and rep productivity. Finn mentioned his team of 8 reps spends significant time on administrative tasks. Expressed interest in seeing how the platform works.

questions_asked.question: What are the biggest time drains for your reps right now?
questions_asked.answer: Mostly CRM updates and follow-up scheduling. We're losing probably 2 hours a day per rep on admin stuff.

questions_asked.question: How does this integrate with our existing CRM?
questions_asked.answer: We have native integrations with all major CRMs. Setup typically takes under an hour.

touches.ai_summary: Cold email sent to Finn Koch. No response received.

48-minute technical evaluation with Finn Koch. Walked through automation workflows, CRM integration, and rep productivity dashboards. Finn engaged positively, asked detailed questions about implementation timeline and team training. Mentioned budget conversations would need to happen soon.

questions_asked.question: How long does implementation typically take for a team our size?
questions_asked.answer: For 8 seats, we typically complete onboarding in 2-3 weeks including training sessions.

questions_asked.question: What's your timeline for making a decision?
questions_asked.answer: Ideally we'd want something in place before end of quarter. I need to discuss budget with leadership.

questions_asked.question: What kind of reporting do you offer for tracking productivity gains?
questions_asked.answer: We have built-in dashboards showing time saved, activity automation rates, and ROI tracking per rep and team-wide.

objections: Need to understand pricing before I can take this further internally

touches.ai_summary: Cold call attempt to Finn Koch. No answer, no voicemail left.

16-minute pricing call with Finn Koch. Presented standard pricing for 8 seats. Finn expressed concern about budget constraints and requested significant discount to move forward this quarter. Agreed to 31.6% discount to $5,800 ACV to close before month-end. Finn will handle internal approval on his own.

questions_asked.question: Is there any flexibility on pricing given our size and timeline?
questions_asked.answer: Let me see what I can do. If you can commit this month, I can get approval for a discount to $5,800 annually.

questions_asked.question: Who else needs to sign off on this internally?
questions_asked.answer: I can handle the approval. Our Director of Ops usually defers to me on sales tools.

objections: Standard pricing is above our allocated budget for this quarter
next_steps: Target contract signature by end of week

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email to Finn Koch with revised proposal at discounted rate of $5,800 for 8 seats with unlimited automation tier. Finn confirmed he's reviewing and will get back with any questions.
LinkedIn message sent to Finn Koch. No response received.
3-minute check-in call with Finn Koch. Finn confirmed he's still reviewing the proposal and expects to have an answer early next week. Brief conversation, no new concerns raised.

questions_asked.question: Any blockers I can help address?
questions_asked.answer: No, just working through the approval process. Should have an answer for you Monday or Tuesday.
